description: EchoAi³ /echo folder for Builder.io LUCCCA platform. Three-layer architecture: Core, Cognition, Interaction.

cognition.description: Recipe knowledge, cross-module awareness, culinary reasoning

interaction.description: UI hooks, toolbar bindings, module context

expansions.description: TRON, sandbox, security, resilience, CI checks

integration.phase1: Core layer (foundation) → Wire NLP backend when ready
integration.phase2: Cognition layer → Register culinary knowledge from KitchenLibrary
integration.phase3: Interaction layer → Wire UI hooks into R&D Labs panels
integration.phase4: Expansions → Enable TRON visualization, security, monitoring

notes: Keep all files as .js (ES6 modules) — NO TypeScript conversion needed.
Bootstrap calls all three layers internally — no manual wiring required.
Use stubs for now. Wire OpenAI + hybrid knowledge base AFTER Echo UI works.
For R&D: prioritize ingredient reasoning → experiment guidance → cross-module → predictions.
TRON visualization implemented by frontend renderer (React Canvas).
Sandbox snapshots enable A/B testing of recipe modifications.
